name: CINTAS CORP
sic_description: Men's & Boys' Furnishgs, Work Clothg, & Allied Garments
summary: Cintas Corporation provides uniform rental and facility services, first aid and safety products, fire protection services, and uniform direct sales to over one million businesses primarily in the U.S., Canada, and Latin America. Products and services include uniforms, mats, mops, shop towels, restroom supplies, workplace water services, first aid products, eye-wash stations, safety training, fire extinguishers, sprinkler systems, and alarm testing.
